name: AnimeShin
subtitle: A modern, unofficial AniList companion application.
description: Official AltStore / SideStore / Feather / LiveContainer source for AnimeShin - track anime & manga, manage your library.

apps.name: AnimeShin
apps.subtitle: A modern, unofficial AniList companion application.
apps.localizedDescription: A modern, unofficial AniList companion application. Track anime & manga, manage your library, and optionally open media using user-configured extensions.

versions.localizedDescription:
- Fixed MacOS build.
- Improved mobile video fullscreen on Android and iOS.
- Player now opens in real fullscreen mode with fullscreen gestures.
- Swipe seek and fullscreen player controls work again.
- Android system bars are hidden better during playback.
- Player no longer forces landscape rotation.
- Player appbar now works in fullscreen.
- Tap video to hide the appbar.
- Tap the video again to show the appbar.
- Tapping play/pause, seek bar, or appbar buttons will not accidentally hide the appbar.
- Moved the progress bar a little higher from the bottom edge.
- Fixed OP/ED skipping on iOS.
- Fixed OP/ED not skipping when it is enabled.
- Fixed OP/ED skipping when it is disabled.
- Fixed Android release build/flavor issue.
- Fixed Android duplicate `MainActivity` build error.
- Fixed notification permission crash on startup.

- Improved mobile video fullscreen on Android and iOS.
- Player now opens in real fullscreen mode with fullscreen gestures.
- Swipe seek and fullscreen player controls work again.
- Android system bars are hidden better during playback.
- Player no longer forces landscape rotation.
- Player appbar now works in fullscreen.
- Tap video to hide the appbar.
- Tap the video again to show the appbar.
- Tapping play/pause, seek bar, or appbar buttons will not accidentally hide the appbar.
- Moved the progress bar a little higher from the bottom edge.
- Fixed OP/ED skipping on iOS.
- Fixed OP/ED not skipping when it is enabled.
- Fixed OP/ED skipping when it is disabled.
- Fixed Android release build/flavor issue.
- Fixed Android duplicate `MainActivity` build error.
- Fixed notification permission crash on startup.

- Added support for new notification types related to submission updates.
- Updated notification models, filters, and views to handle and display submission update notifications.
- Enhanced background handler and GraphQL utilities for new notification types.
- Fixed random time jumps after long pause/resume.
- Improved stream stability when frequently seeking forward/back.
- Better protection against “unreturnable skipped moments” without restarting player.
- Kept fast loading speed from recent updates.
- Added clearer debug traces for faster issue diagnosis.
- No auto-reopen workaround behavior added.
- Restored fast stream loading speed.
- Re-enabled keep-alive for better performance.
- Kept segment safety fixes (retry, timeout, short-read checks).
- Added idle-only connection refresh after long pause (stability guard).
- Fixed rare stream skips after long pause/seek.
- Improved HLS playback stability (better segment handling).
- Better internal diagnostics to track playback issues faster.
- Safer decoder/network behavior to reduce random jumps.
- Collection filters are now saved per list page, and the filtering logic has been fixed
- Added search via Russian titles
- Manga reading support (Beta)

- Fixed a crash when opening anime/manga pages caused by unexpected/null enum values in user settings.
- Improved robustness of settings parsing, unknown or missing types from the API are now safely ignored.
- Added a regression test to ensure future settings changes won’t break page loading.

- Restored fast stream loading speed.
- Re-enabled keep-alive for better performance.
- Kept segment safety fixes (retry, timeout, short-read checks).
- Added idle-only connection refresh after long pause (stability guard).
- Fixed rare stream skips after long pause/seek.

- Fixed rare stream skips after long pause/seek.
- Improved HLS playback stability (better segment handling).
- Better internal diagnostics to track playback issues faster.
- Safer decoder/network behavior to reduce random jumps.
- Collection filters are now saved per list page, and the filtering logic has been fixed
- Added search via Russian titles
- Manga reading support (Beta)

- Collection filters are now saved per list page, and the filtering logic has been fixed
- Added search via Russian titles
- Manga reading support (Beta)

- Player pop-up notifications are now working on fullscreen mode
- Add voiceover loading state management and snackbar feedback
- Fix a bug related to multiple players opening
- Collection list now updates immediately when you:
  - change progress
  - change status
  - add/remove anime or manga
- Auto-next now closes the player when there is no next episode.
- Auto-next now also closes the player if next-episode loading fails.
- When closing after the last episode, the app now exits fullscreen first, then returns to the watch list page.
- Player close behavior is more reliable from fullscreen and overlay states.
- Smarter refresh of collection lists.
- Smarter player stream routing: local proxy is now used for HLS, while direct streams (like `.mp4`) open directly.  
- Added one-time playback fallback retry between local proxy and direct modes to reduce module watch failures.  
- HLS settle timeout logic now runs only for HLS/proxy playback, avoiding unnecessary waits on direct files.  
- Added stream transport policy tests (HLS/direct/unknown classification + proxy/fallback behavior).  
- Module watch flow now passes and validates `mediaId` for playback resume correctness.  
- Desktop startup now enforces single-instance lock and handles window settings lock conflicts safely.  
- Removed Feed from Home navigation and Home Tab defaults (Settings > Defaults > Home Tab).  
- Added Feed button to the user profile button row and reordered buttons to: Activities, Favourites, Feed, Social, Statistics, Reviews.  
- Home navigation updated: `Discover` and `Feed` positions were swapped.
- New installs now open on `Discover` by default.
- Discover cards now show a secondary Russian/Shikimori title when `Display Russian Titles` is enabled.
- Discover search got a smart fallback: if AniList returns no results on first page, Shikimori title variants are tried automatically.
- Russian title toggle now applies to already opened Discover results without needing manual refresh.
- Stability and performance improvements for Discover async updates and title enrichment.
- Faster startup module handling: extension index now loads immediately from local data without blocking on remote refresh
- Improved module playback reliability: module streams now start via proxy by default for better HLS/header compatibility (including iOS)
- Smarter voiceover flow: voiceover detection and first stream probe are combined to avoid duplicate heavy parsing
- Better slow-source resilience: stream extraction now uses longer, safer timeouts with optional per-module overrides
- Reduced repeated module work: runtime, executor, search, and settings now share one module loader instance
- More stable startup updates: remote extension refresh runs in background with per-module timeout and safe loopback skipping
- Settings consistency improvements: module mutations now properly invalidate shared index/cache state
- Added regression coverage for loader refresh behavior, remote refresh timeout handling, and voiceover probe logic
- The Seek steps function now works correctly in fullscreen mode
- Code fix and improvement
  - Manga reading support
  - Faster module loading at startup
  - Better stream playback duration detection
  - Improved search using Russian titles
  - Stability improvements on Windows

A modern unofficial AniList client for tracking, notifications and optional community streaming extensions.

⚠️ The app itself does NOT include any built-in streaming services.
Content depends on user-installed extensions.

Platforms:
Windows • macOS • Android • iOS (sideload)

## What's new
- Faster startup module handling: extension index now loads immediately from local data without blocking on remote refresh
- Improved module playback reliability: module streams now start via proxy by default for better HLS/header compatibility (including iOS)
- Smarter voiceover flow: voiceover detection and first stream probe are combined to avoid duplicate heavy parsing
- Better slow-source resilience: stream extraction now uses longer, safer timeouts with optional per-module overrides
- Reduced repeated module work: runtime, executor, search, and settings now share one module loader instance
- More stable startup updates: remote extension refresh runs in background with per-module timeout and safe loopback skipping
- Settings consistency improvements: module mutations now properly invalidate shared index/cache state
- Added regression coverage for loader refresh behavior, remote refresh timeout handling, and voiceover probe logic
- The Seek steps function now works correctly in fullscreen mode
- Code fix and improvement
• Manga reading support
• Faster module loading at startup
• Better stream playback duration detection
• Improved search using Russian titles
• Stability improvements on Windows

A modern unofficial AniList client for tracking, notifications and optional community streaming extensions.

⚠️ The app itself does NOT include any built-in streaming services.
Content depends on user-installed extensions.

Platforms:
Windows • macOS • Android • iOS (sideload)

## What's new
- The ***Seek steps*** function now works correctly in fullscreen mode
- Code fix and improvement
• Manga reading support
• Faster module loading at startup
• Better stream playback duration detection
• Improved search using Russian titles
• Stability improvements on Windows

A modern, unofficial AniList client with Russian titles and community sources (Sora-compatible).

## ✨ What’s New
- **Crash**: Maybe fix the crash on Windows.
- **Updater**: Auto update of modules at app start.
- **Proxy**: Proxing some streams to fix the issue with duration.
- **Manga support**: Now you can read manga with Sora-compatible modules.
- **Sora compatibility**: Accepts `scriptURL`/`iconURL` key casing in module JSON.

A modern, unofficial AniList client with Russian titles and community sources (Sora-compatible).

## ✨ What’s New
- **Fix**: delayed auto next episode.
- **Fix**: watch/read pages and anime/manga detail header now reflect progress immediately after auto-progress.
- **Player**: Refactor playback settling logic to eliminate position fallback and improve stability
- **Bug fix**: Resolved an infinite stream loading issue, and improved episode position restore logic.
- **UI**: Add horizontal scroll buttons on `_ChipSelector` for Desktop.
- **Manga support**: Now you can read manga with Sora-compatible modules.
- **Sora compatibility**: Accepts `scriptURL`/`iconURL` key casing in module JSON.

A modern, unofficial AniList client with Russian titles and community sources (Sora-compatible).

## ✨ What’s New
- **Bug Fixes**: Module loading logic now works stably. Modules Export/Import button now works on the mobile version of the app.
- **Fullscreen**: Now, auto next episode is working properly for fullscreen mode.
- **Improved Player**: Now, the top elements are above the player.
- **Removed**: Removed swipe to previous page from player.
- **Manga support**: Now you can read manga with Sora compatible modules.
- **Fixed iOS Player**: Now you can watch with the native iOS Player.
- **Improvements**: Improved voiceover choosing menu logic.
- **Updates**: Updated all Flutter libs.
- **Module filtering**: Watch shows only anime modules; Read shows only manga modules.
- **UI polish**: Watch/Read buttons use solid icons, white text, and refined spacing.
- **Sora compatibility**: Accepts `scriptURL`/`iconURL` key casing in module JSON.

A modern, unofficial AniList client with Russian titles and community sources (Sora-compatible).

## ✨ What’s New
- **Improved Player**: Now, the top elements are above the player.
- **Removed**: Removed swipe to previous page from player.
- **Manga support**: Now you can read manga with Sora compatible modules.
- **Fixed iOS Player**: Now you can watch with the native iOS Player.
- **Improvements**: Improved voiceover choosing menu logic.
- **Updates**: Updated all Flutter libs.
- **Module filtering**: Watch shows only anime modules; Read shows only manga modules.
- **UI polish**: Watch/Read buttons use solid icons, white text, and refined spacing.
- **Sora compatibility**: Accepts `scriptURL`/`iconURL` key casing in module JSON.
- 
## Highlights
- **AniList sync**: track anime & manga, update progress quickly.
- **Russian titles & search**: Russian titles from Shikimori + search by RU titles in your library.
- **Watch (Sora sources)**: watch episodes using community sources.
- **Swipe-based progress**: swipe covers to update episode/chapter progress.
- **Notes & scores**: rate entries and attach personal notes.
- **Notifications**: new episode aired alerts.
- **Secure authentication**: OAuth-based login with AniList.

## Install
### Android
- Download the APK for your device/ABI and install it.
- If Android blocks installation, enable “Install unknown apps” for your browser/file manager.

### Windows
- Download and unzip the Windows build.
- Run `AnimeShin.exe`.

### iOS
- Use [SideStore ](https://sidestore.io/) & [LiveContainer ](https://github.com/LiveContainer/LiveContainer) (recommended)

### macOS
- Download the macOS build (`.dmg`) and move `AnimeShin.app` to **Applications**.
- If macOS blocks opening the app:
  - Right-click `AnimeShin.app` → **Open** → **Open**, or
  - Go to **System Settings → Privacy & Security** → **Open Anyway**.
- If the app is still blocked due to quarantine (advanced, Terminal):
  - `xattr -dr com.apple.quarantine /Applications/AnimeShin.app`

## Notes
- This is an **unofficial** client. AniList, Shikimori, and community sources are third-party services.
- Settings and data are stored locally on-device.

## Known issues / preview caveats
- Community sources availability depends on the configured Sora-compatible sources.
- 2 subtitles on iOS.

## Credits
- Inspiration: [Otraku](https://github.com/lotusprey/otraku)
- Source ecosystem inspiration: [Sora](https://github.com/cranci1)
- Russian titles & metadata: [Shikimori](https://shikimori.one/)

## Privacy
See PRIVACY_POLICY.md.

## ✨ What’s New
- **Module filtering**: Watch shows only anime modules; Read shows only manga modules.
- **UI polish**: Watch/Read buttons use solid icons, white text, and refined spacing.
- **Sora compatibility**: accepts `scriptURL`/`iconURL` key casing in module JSON.

A modern, unofficial AniList client with Russian titles and community sources (Sora-compatible).

## ✨ What’s New
- **Shikimori Export**: added favorite for export.
- **Modules settings**: adjust padding for bottom navigation bar.

A modern, unofficial AniList client with Russian titles and community sources (Sora-compatible).

apps.versionDescription:
- Fixed MacOS build.
- Improved mobile video fullscreen on Android and iOS.
- Player now opens in real fullscreen mode with fullscreen gestures.
- Swipe seek and fullscreen player controls work again.
- Android system bars are hidden better during playback.
- Player no longer forces landscape rotation.
- Player appbar now works in fullscreen.
- Tap video to hide the appbar.
- Tap the video again to show the appbar.
- Tapping play/pause, seek bar, or appbar buttons will not accidentally hide the appbar.
- Moved the progress bar a little higher from the bottom edge.
- Fixed OP/ED skipping on iOS.
- Fixed OP/ED not skipping when it is enabled.
- Fixed OP/ED skipping when it is disabled.
- Fixed Android release build/flavor issue.
- Fixed Android duplicate `MainActivity` build error.
- Fixed notification permission crash on startup.
